sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented. Isometric 2D simulation game with tile-based movement.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game is business simulation with isometric tile-based movement. Player does not directly control character movement but rather builds and manages transportation networks using trains, trucks, buses, ships, airplanes, and helicopters.

physics_values.note: Vehicle speeds vary by type and model, determined by game data tables rather than character physics

special_mechanics.name: Terrain and Elevation
special_mechanics.description: Terrain can be terraformed per tile. Buildings like train stations can only be built on even ground. Canals can be built to improve routes.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Transport Tycoon is a business simulation game, not a character-action game. Traditional player movement physics (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) are not applicable. The game uses vehicle-based movement on tile-based isometric maps. No documented sub-pixel systems or character physics parameters exist in available sources.
